name: public_health_municipal_bond_covenant_harbor_auto_ben
premise: Two departments published incompatible guidance; frontline staff are improvising and liability is concentrating on one signature line. In Public Health, the situation tagged internally around public health municipal bond covenant harbor auto ben has converged with local pressure in the Cedar Point corridor. That label is not a full explanation, but it is how crews, counsel, and comms are indexing the case file right now. A reporter has partial screenshots; if the official narrative shifts later, the organization risks a false-information allegation. Legal has not signed off on data sharing between teams; analysts are inferring causality from incomplete joins. Regulators or auditors are en route with a ninety-minute ETA; the first documented response will anchor every later question. Framing has already hardened externally as autonomy against beneficence; internal nuance will not survive the first news cycle unless it is extremely careful.

agents.name: Elliot Navarro
agents.identity: I am Elliot Navarro, the accountable executive on this bridge in Public Health. I own the signature line that turns a recommendation into an irreversible operational fact for the next phase.
agents.goal: I need a path that does not treat beneficence as disposable collateral every time autonomy spikes in urgency, but I also cannot pretend we have luxury time we do not have.

agents.name: Marco Okoye
agents.identity: I am Marco Okoye, the counsel or integrity officer watching downstream liability in Public Health. I am tracking who gets protected last if we choose speed, silence, or a narrow definition of success.
agents.goal: I want explicit guardrails so autonomy cannot become a blank check that quietly vaporizes beneficence in the paperwork afterward.

choices: I will sequence a conservative rollout: smallest blast radius first, documented exceptions only, and real appeals paths—even if autonomy advocates call that foot-dragging.
I will push a fast, organization-wide lever because partial fixes may leave the worst harm untouched—even if that compresses protections for beneficence.
forced_choice.call_to_action: Silence will be interpreted as a decision by everyone outside this room. Elliot Navarro must choose under autonomy versus beneficence. What does Elliot Navarro do?
